# n8n Import Fixtures

These fixtures are real public n8n workflow template exports fetched from:

- `https://api.n8n.io/api/workflows/templates/1700` -> `quickstart.json`
- `https://api.n8n.io/api/workflows/templates/1748` -> `http-if.json`
- `https://api.n8n.io/api/workflows/templates/1750` -> `webhook-endpoint.json`
- `https://api.n8n.io/api/workflows/templates/1747` -> `merge-code.json`

Each file contains only the `workflow` object from the API response. Credential
values are not included in these public templates.
